title: Feature: add reindex command
task: Add a `reindex` CLI command that forces a full re-index of the project (equivalent to `mnemex index --force`). It should accept the same options as `index` but always set force=true.
output:
The diagnostics are pre-existing environment issues (missing `@types/node`, missing modules) unrelated to my changes. Both edits are done.

The `reindex` command:
- Added at `cli.ts:277` in the switch statement — delegates to `handleCloudIndex` or `handleIndex` with `--force` prepended to the args
- Added to the help text at line ~6364 with a description pointing to `index --force`

All other options (`--no-llm`, `--concurrency=N`, `--wait`, path argument, etc.) pass through unchanged since they come from `args.slice(1)`.
